finding_results.notes: Restored Tommy as the initial dispatcher caller from the deck at seven, reframed Paul's study call as callback/follow-up work, and extended the deputy-only window to 9:52 before Mallick's arrival.
Rebuilt Mallick's entrance around the required wrong-name, casserole, and bathroom beats with new syntax, new self-correction, and fresh tangents instead of the style-bible calibration phrasing.
Removed all 'the specific [noun]' constructions and replaced the flagged spots with concrete hallway, body, and coaching-loss detail.
Reintroduced Tommy's locker-room sexual humor and profanity into the Viagra thread so the guilt spiral keeps the chapter's crude comic texture rather than playing only as abstract shame.
Repunctuated the chapter away from em-dash-led narration. Post-revision scan found 0 em-dash lines in chapter 03.
Varied sentence openings across the chapter's major movement blocks. Post-revision scan found 2 'He'-starting sentences out of 335 total sentences.
Cut the hedge habit down to 3 remaining instances of 'something,' all in character-true dialogue or bounded description.

summary: Fixed all seven packet findings in chapter 03: restored canon-compliant morning chronology, refreshed Mallick's entrance voice, sharpened Tommy's crude-comic Viagra guilt, and reduced the flagged prose tics below threshold.
